For Preliminary Injunction To Enjoin Improper Trustee Sale Of Property At Hill Street Mpa
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Karen Y. Uchiyama, 415-563-9300 of the Law Office of Kaen Uchiyama appearing via zoom for Plaintiff Zoriall, LLC.
Ravi Sahae, 415.957.1800 of Leland, Parachini, Steinberg, Matzger & Melnick LLP appearing via Zoom for Defendant Lin Dee Liu.

Argued. Ms. Uchiyama states that she will be contesting the sanctions and not the entire tentative ruling. She states that she is not going to argue that the motion is moot. Ms. Uchiyama states that she didn't withdraw the motion because she wanted to see the Defendants response.

Mr. Sahae states that he asked the Plaintiff to withdraw the motion but she refused because she wanted a record of the Defendant's opposition and wanted the Court see the opposition and why no reply was filed. Mr. Sahae states that Ms. Uchiyama knew the motion was moot because he sent a copy of the recorded document. Therefore, this was harassment under 128.5.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ZORIALL, LLC, ANNE KIHAGI For Preliminary Injunction To Enjoin Improper Trustee Sale Of Property At Hill Street
is DENIED. Moving papers fail to comply with CRC 3.1110(a) and CRC 3.1113(d) and (f). Furthermore, motion is moot. Request for sanctions under CCP 128.5 is granted and sanctions awarded in the amount of $3,825 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. No reply filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
